grip.title: Grip strength assessment
grip.subtitle: Enter peak grip (kg) to calculate grip-axis score.

referenceInfo.title: Assessment references
referenceInfo.p1: Formula: score = peakKg × 1.4, then ×1.6 for female scoring. Score keeps one decimal and may exceed 100.
referenceInfo.p2: Model cap is 160 kg. Inputs above the cap are clamped for scoring and storage.
referenceInfo.p3: Cap benchmark: Magnus Samuelsson. This is a product guardrail, not a competition certification.

grip.capNoticeBody: You entered {{input}} kg, above the grip model cap of {{max}} kg. Scoring and saved value are locked to {{max}} kg.
grip.capNoticeLegend: Cap benchmark: Swedish strongman Magnus Samuelsson.
grip.nextMilestoneHint: Next Milestone: {{points}} pts until next tier upgrade.
grip.submitDone: Saved — Home radar and merged scores now use this grip axis.
grip.profileIncompleteHint: Grip conversion needs a complete Home profile (sex, age, height, weight).

errors.missing-profile: Add a complete physical profile on Home first.
errors.invalid-peak: Enter a positive peak grip value in kg.
